title: Referral status chip
description: Colour-coded chip for referral.status. Values: pending_claim (neutral), claimed (info), signed_up (info), trigger_pending (info), vesting (warning), vested (success), rewarded (success solid), cancelled (neutral), expired (neutral), fraudulent (danger). Never relies on colour alone — always carries a text label + optional icon.

variant.$expr: ({ pending_claim: 'neutral', claimed: 'info', signed_up: 'info', trigger_pending: 'info', vesting: 'warning', vested: 'success', rewarded: 'success', cancelled: 'neutral', expired: 'neutral', fraudulent: 'danger' })[props.status]

leadingIcon.$expr: props.showIcon ? ({ pending_claim: 'clock', claimed: 'cursor-arrow-rays', signed_up: 'user-plus', trigger_pending: 'bolt', vesting: 'hourglass', vested: 'check', rewarded: 'gift', cancelled: 'x-mark', expired: 'calendar-x', fraudulent: 'shield-exclamation' })[props.status] : null

children.$expr: ({ pending_claim: 'Pending claim', claimed: 'Claimed', signed_up: 'Signed up', trigger_pending: 'Trigger pending', vesting: 'Vesting', vested: 'Vested', rewarded: 'Rewarded', cancelled: 'Cancelled', expired: 'Expired', fraudulent: 'Fraudulent' })[props.status]
